title: Recursive Fibonacci Function
scenario: Generate a prompt that creates a recursive function in C++ to calculate the nth Fibonacci number. The function should take an integer n as input and return the corresponding Fibonacci number. The output should include the complete C++ function body, with the recursive logic correctly implemented. The prompt should be under 100 words and use present tense.
constraints: Must use a recursive approach to calculate the Fibonacci number
Must include a base case to handle invalid input

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the output meets the constraints.
Verify the output recursive logic and base case.
